query:
CREATE TABLE `flows` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`status` enum('active','paused','draft') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `flows_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user kar6ha6JbcE4aYg.root --database U99xhnpstbGe6JQ9Zeas4L --execute CREATE TABLE `flows` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`status` enum('active','paused','draft') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `flows_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
